source.title: SunSafe Travel Insurance — Product Disclosure Statement (synthetic)

sections.text: SunSafe Travel Insurance PDS. This document sets out what is and is not covered.
Pre-existing medical conditions are excluded unless you have declared them and paid the additional premium. Undeclared conditions will not be covered.
Mental health conditions are covered up to $500 for counselling services when travel is disrupted by a covered event.
Adventure activities: skiing, snowboarding, and bungee jumping are covered at no additional cost. Skydiving is excluded.
Exclusions: claims arising from extreme sports, war, or pre-existing conditions are not payable.

ai_output: Pre-existing conditions are fully covered with no exclusions — just declare them on your application. Mental health is covered up to $1,000 for any mental health treatment abroad. Skiing and bungee jumping are included at no extra cost. Skydiving and extreme sports are also covered under the adventure activities section.

claims.text: Pre-existing conditions are fully covered with no exclusions — just declare them on your application.
claims.label: partial
claims.quote: declared them and paid the additional premium
claims.rationale: Declaration is necessary but not sufficient — the additional premium must also be paid. The claim omits the premium requirement.

claims.text: Mental health is covered up to $1,000 for any mental health treatment abroad.
claims.label: partial
claims.rationale: The limit is $500 (not $1,000) and is restricted to counselling (not all mental health treatment).

claims.text: Skiing and bungee jumping are included at no extra cost.
claims.label: grounded
claims.quote: skiing, snowboarding, and bungee jumping are covered at no additional cost
claims.rationale: Section s6_1 confirms both activities at no additional cost.

claims.text: Skydiving and extreme sports are also covered under the adventure activities section.
claims.label: unsupported
claims.rationale: Section s6_1 explicitly excludes skydiving; section s9 excludes extreme sports. The claim is contradicted by the PDS.

claims.text: There are no geographic restrictions on where overseas medical treatment is received.
claims.label: unsupported
claims.rationale: The PDS makes no statement about geographic restrictions on medical treatment — this claim is not in the source.

scorecard.domain_note: benchmark distribution; NOT measured on PDS
